questions.title: Taints, tolerations, and NoExecute eviction diagnostics
questions.question:
A taint and toleration diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `taint-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `taints-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `taint-api`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment taint-api -n taints-lab -o wide`
- `tolerationKeyCheck` is `kubectl get deployment taint-api -n taints-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.tolerations[0].key}'`
- `tolerationEffectCheck` is `kubectl get deployment taint-api -n taints-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.tolerations[0].effect}'`
- `tolerationOperatorCheck` is `kubectl get deployment taint-api -n taints-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.tolerations[0].operator}'`
- `tolerationSecondsCheck` is `kubectl get deployment taint-api -n taints-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.tolerations[0].tolerationSeconds}'`
- `nodeSelectorCheck` is `kubectl get deployment taint-api -n taints-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.nodeSelector.workload}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n taints-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm taint effect, toleration seconds, and node selector before changing workload manifests or mutating node taints`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/taint-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/taint-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `Toleration Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not delete pods, do not restart the Deployment, and do not patch live node taints during this drill.
